{/* HERO SECTION */}

Rajkumar BK

IT Network Engineer | Japan

Passionate IT Network Engineer living in Japan with experience in enterprise networking, Microsoft 365, Active Directory, troubleshooting, virtualization, and cloud technologies. Currently working in a multinational company supporting modern IT infrastructure.

Contact Me View Projects
{/* ABOUT */}

About Me

I am a dedicated IT Network Engineer with professional experience in enterprise IT support, networking, Windows systems, virtualization, Microsoft technologies, and cloud solutions.

I specialize in troubleshooting complex IT issues, managing Active Directory environments, VPNs, LAN/WAN infrastructure, Microsoft 365 administration, and endpoint support.

Currently based in Japan and working in a multinational company, I continuously improve my technical and Japanese communication skills.
